overall.description: First-person gameplay footage moving through a post-apocalyptic, snow-covered urban environment resembling Las Vegas at night. The player walks through rocky canyons and abandoned streets featuring recognizable landmarks like the MGM sign, New York-New York hotel, and a giant Coca-Cola bottle, with neon lights illuminating the ruins.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow snow-filled canyon toward distant city lights

tall snow-dusted rock formation forming the right boundary of the canyon
snow or ash-covered ground surface throughout the path
illuminated green MGM sign visible in the distance between the canyon walls

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view walking through a narrow, snow-covered canyon with high rock walls on both sides. The path leads toward a distant illuminated cityscape with the MGM sign visible ahead. The environment is dark and enclosed with snow covering the ground.

agents.ego_description: emerging from the canyon and walking across the open plaza toward the ruins and buildings ahead

scattered rock formations and debris in the open plaza area

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the narrow canyon into a wide-open plaza covered in snow. The New York-New York hotel sign becomes prominently visible in the center distance, while a white car sits on the right. The MGM sign remains visible to the left as the player moves through the ruins toward the main street.

segments.scene_description: Moving along a snow-dusted abandoned street lined with ruined commercial buildings. The pink Huntridge Theater and a massive Coca-Cola bottle structure dominate the right side, while green neon lights illuminate the background. The environment shows heavy decay with debris scattered across the asphalt.

bright green illuminated area visible through the underpass tunnel

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a narrow alley between tall buildings, passing under a concrete overpass. The space becomes increasingly enclosed with walls covered in advertisements on both sides. A bright green-lit area is visible ahead through the tunnel-like passage, creating a stark contrast with the surrounding darkness.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a claustrophobic snowy canyon into a sprawling ruined cityscape that eventually narrows back into a dark urban alley. It begins by navigating a narrow, snow-covered passage between high rock walls, moving steadily toward the distant glow of the MGM sign. As the camera exits the canyon, the environment opens into a wide, snow-blanketed plaza where the New York-New York hotel sign looms in the distance beside a stranded white car. The scene then shifts onto a decaying main street lined with debris, passing the pink Huntridge Theater and a massive Coca-Cola bottle illuminated by green neon lights. Finally, the path turns away from the open ruins and enters a tight alleyway beneath a concrete overpass, moving through a tunnel of advertisements toward a bright green light ahead.
